name: Fallout: New Vegas
description: Fallout: New Vegas content for the Chasm Bridge FNV mod: the Goodsprings and Novac NPC rosters as character cards, a unified Mojave lorebook (Goodsprings + Novac area lore and Mojave basics), the FNV action and quest books, and the generated entity/item spawn catalogs. Also carries the FNV voice extractor so chasm can clone each NPC's real in-game voice. Drop this folder into chasm (or let the mod copy it in) and the Mojave cast comes to life.
comment: Authored game content + the per-game voice extractor. No chat logs, conversation history, live-chat state, embeddings, or save-sync snapshots are bundled - those are per-user runtime data. Voice CLIPS are not shipped either; extract_voices.py pulls them from the player's own game files when they clone. Named NPCs resolve to their own lines via 'edid'; generic/un-named NPCs use a 'voicetype' override.

companions.faceDesignHint: Opens the vanilla character creator next time you tab into the game; your own appearance is restored after.
companions.voiceHint: Drop an audio clip (~10-20s of clean speech; WAV/FLAC/OGG). It runs through the voice-clone pipeline and becomes their spoken voice.
companions.comment: Game-side companion capabilities. chasm renders these; everything FNV-specific (template esp pool, chargen flow, follow AI) lives in the NVBridge mod. Remove this block to disable companions for the profile.
